inputs.label: Weight
inputs.businessContext: Body weight in kilograms (e.g., from scale measurement).

businessContext_i18n.en: Body weight in kilograms (e.g., from scale measurement).
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht in Kilogramm (z. B. von der Waage).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel en kilogrammes (par exemple, mesure sur balance).
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso corporal en kilogramos (ej. de medición en báscula).

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age in years (for reference only; Navy formula does not use age).

businessContext_i18n.en: Age in years (for reference only; Navy formula does not use age).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yaş (sadece referans amaçlı; Navy formülü yaşı kullanmaz).
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter in Jahren (nur als Referenz; die Navy-Formel verwendet kein Alter).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge en années (à titre indicatif uniquement ; la formule de la Marine n'utilise pas l'âge).
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad en años (solo como referencia; la fórmula de la Armada no usa la edad).

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: 0 for female, 1 for male (required for U.S. Navy body fat formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for female, 1 for male (required for U.S. Navy body fat formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 kadın, 1 erkek (ABD Navy vücut yağ formülü için gereklidir).
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für weiblich, 1 für männlich (erforderlich für die U.S. Navy-Körperfettformel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour femme, 1 pour homme (requis pour la formule de graisse corporelle de la Marine américaine).
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para mujer, 1 para hombre (requerido para la fórmula de grasa corporal de la Armada de EE. UU.).

inputs.label: Waist Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Waist circumference measured at the navel level (required for Navy formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Waist circumference measured at the navel level (required for Navy formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Göbek hizasında bel çevresi (Navy formülü için gereklidir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Taillenumfang gemessen auf Nabelhöhe (erforderlich für die Navy-Formel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de taille mesuré au niveau du nombril (requis pour la formule de la Marine).
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia de cintura medida a la altura del ombligo (requerida para la fórmula de la Armada).

inputs.label: Hip Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Hip circumference at the widest point (required for female Navy formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Hip circumference at the widest point (required for female Navy formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: En geniş noktada kalça çevresi (kadın Navy formülü için gereklidir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Hüftumfang an der breitesten Stelle (erforderlich für die weibliche Navy-Formel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de hanches au point le plus large (requis pour la formule de la Marine pour les femmes).
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia de cadera en el punto más ancho (requerida para la fórmula femenina de la Armada).

inputs.label: Neck Circumference
inputs.businessContext: Neck circumference measured just below the larynx (required for Navy formula).

businessContext_i18n.en: Neck circumference measured just below the larynx (required for Navy formula).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gırtlağın hemen altında boyun çevresi (Navy formülü için gereklidir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Halsumfang gemessen direkt unterhalb des Kehlkopfes (erforderlich für die Navy-Formel).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tour de cou mesuré juste sous le larynx (requis pour la formule de la Marine).
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia del cuello medida justo debajo de la laringe (requerida para la fórmula de la Armada).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
